title: Runtime Validation, Parsing, and Trust Boundaries · Type-System Trace: Unsafe Assertion Audit
summary: Parse API, storage, URL, form, and message values into trustworthy domain records without unsafe casts. Planned artifact: Add and verify the ts unsafe assertion audit increment in a runtime-validated public data adapter. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Locate and replace as, non-null, double assertions, any, and suppression directives with evidence-producing boundaries.
Use brands or refined constructors only after runtime validation establishes the represented invariant.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
